seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is an older adult female named Sophia Brown, born 3/17/1946
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: This is a new patient visit to establish care for a history of DCIS of the right breast
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: In October 2019 a calcification was found in the patient's right breast on screening mammogram
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On November 3rd 2019 right breast ultrasound showed a mass at the 2 o'clock position, 11 cm from the nipple in the retroareolar region measuring approximately 0.4 x 2 x 3 cm
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On December 5th 2019 the patient had an ultrasound-guided core needle biopsy of the right breast mass
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Pathology from the December 5th 2019 biopsy showed grade 2 ER-positive PR-positive ductal carcinoma in situ of the right breast
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient underwent a right breast lumpectomy on January 20th 2020
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The January 20th 2020 lumpectomy removed an 8 mm DCIS tumor from the right breast with negative margins
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Five lymph nodes were removed at the time of lumpectomy and were negative for malignancy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient received radiation therapy after the lumpectomy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Endocrine therapy was discussed after lumpectomy but the patient declined it
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's breast cancer is documented as stage 0 ER/PR-positive ductal carcinoma of the right breast status post lumpectomy and radiation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports feeling good since the lumpectomy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient performs regular self-breast exams and has not felt any breast masses since surgery
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's last mammogram in January 2021 was normal with no evidence of recurrence or malignancy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had a colonoscopy in 2018 that found one sigmoid colon polyp which was a benign tubular adenoma and was removed
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is postmenopausal with last menstrual period approximately 30 years ago
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had five pregnancies and five live births (G5P5)
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies any history of miscarriages or terminations
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has never used hormone replacement therapy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a history of high cholesterol
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's high cholesterol is a relatively new diagnosis and is being followed by her primary care doctor
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is attempting to manage her high cholesterol with exercise and reducing fatty foods without medication
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports chronic back pain and knee or joint pain attributed by prior doctors to age-related changes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On review of systems the patient denies recent weight loss or gain, headaches, bone pain, urinary symptoms, or blood in the stool
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient takes CoQ10, vitamin D, vitamin C, fish oil, and elderberry fruit as current medications or supplements
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient previously had a tubal ligation after her last baby
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's mother had non-Hodgkin's lymphoma
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's father had prostate cancer and heart disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is no family history of breast cancer
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has no siblings and her children are all healthy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a history of cigarette smoking but quit approximately 30 years ago
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies illicit drug use
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient drinks alcohol socially but not heavily
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a documented allergy to penicillin
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On breast exam there are no palpable breast masses
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On breast exam there is skin thickening at the medial inferior aspect of the right breast thought to represent radiation skin changes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's ECOG performance status today is 0
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Today's clinical examination shows no evidence of recurrence of DCIS or other malignancy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The plan is to continue observation for the patient's stage 0 ER/PR-positive right breast carcinoma
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is to return for follow-up in one year
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is advised to obtain a mammogram in April 2022 before the next follow-up visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
